hooks.command:
cmd=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then lint_out=$(cd ~/Workspace/slidecraft && npx eslint src/ --max-warnings=0 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then echo "$lint_out" | jq -Rsc '{"continue":false,"stopReason":("ESLint failed. Fix before committing.
"+.)}'; fi; fi
